title: Navigate the city
objective: Integrar lugares, rutas, distancias y estrategias de aclaración para desplazarse por una ciudad.

activities.prompt: The museum is on the other side of the street.
activities.feedback_correct: Cross the street indica que debes pasar al otro lado.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la acción relacionada con cruzar una calle.

activities.prompt: ___ is the bus station from here?
activities.feedback_correct: How far pregunta por la distancia.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la expresión para medir distancia.

activities.prompt: Could you show me the way to the station?
options: Sure. Go straight and turn left.
activities.correct_answer: Sure. Go straight and turn left.
activities.feedback_correct: Es una respuesta útil con instrucciones.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una ruta, no una definición ni un dato personal.

activities.prompt: straight / go / past / the / bank / and / turn / right
activities.correct_answer: Go straight past the bank and turn right.
activities.feedback_correct: La ruta combina go straight, past y turn right.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con Go straight y coloca turn right al final.

activities.instruction: Une cada necesidad con la estrategia adecuada.
activities.feedback_correct: Usas la estrategia apropiada para cada momento de la ruta.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Distingue repetir, preguntar distancia, confirmar y comprobar destino.

activities.prompt: Start at the hotel. Go straight for two blocks, turn left at the bank, and cross the street. The museum is behind the library, next to the park.
activities.question: Where is the museum?
options: Behind the library and next to the park.
activities.correct_answer: Behind the library and next to the park.
activities.feedback_correct: La ubicación final contiene dos referencias.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la descripción después de The museum is.

activities.instruction: Graba una ruta para un visitante.
activities.prompt: Go straight for two blocks. Turn left at the bank. Cross the street. The museum is behind the library, next to the park.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu ruta es comprensible y contiene referencias útiles.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica straight y street por separado y después vuelve a unir la ruta.

activities.instruction: Lee el mapa textual y responde.
activities.prompt: The visitor center is opposite the train station. The hotel is two blocks behind the station. The museum is between the hotel and the park. The pharmacy is next to the visitor center.
activities.question: What is between the hotel and the park?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice the museum is between the hotel and the park.

activities.prompt: Write a twelve-step walking route from a hotel to three places. Include landmarks, distance, turns, one clarification question, and one confirmation.

activities.instruction: Ayuda a un turista con la IA.
activities.prompt: The AI is a tourist with three destinations and limited time. Give routes, answer questions, handle a misunderstanding, and help choose the best order.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes orientar a alguien y resolver problemas durante el trayecto.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA presenta un mapa cambiante y practica las partes de la ruta que cuestan más.
